case_title: LING LI VS. JOAQUIN HERNANDEZ AGUAS

docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER TO GO TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT RETURNED UNCLAIMED BY DEFENDANT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-22-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-02-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT, DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "GRANTED", PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, LING AS TO DEFENDANT AGUAS, JOAQUIN HERNANDEZ
ORDER ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850. REQUEST GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. (JUDGMENT ENTERED ON: OCTOBER 12, 2010).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-10-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-22-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-17-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, LING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AGUAS, JOAQUIN HERNANDEZ $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,560.00, THE COURT AWARDS DAMAGES OF $3750.00 AND ATTRIBUTES 40% COMPARITIVE FAULT TO DEFENDANT. THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DEFENDANT'S PROPORTIONATE SHARE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
